case_title: JEROME MARTEL SADDLER VS. JERREL CROSS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SADDLER, JEROME MARTEL AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS, JERREL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SADDLER, JEROME MARTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROSS, JERREL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF WRITTEN NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY AND VIOLATED CIVIL CODE SECTION 789(B)(1) RESULTING IN LIABILITY UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 789(C)(2). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.84 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS, JERREL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS, JERREL
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JERREL CROSS 25 ADDISON ST.;SF,CA. 94131

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-04-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SADDLER, JEROME MARTEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
